author: SantiMod
content:
Escape Velocity Stats Update

It's been less than a week and we've already had...
• 3,400,000+ transactions (~2.9% of total Solana transactions since EV released!)  
• 4,950+ wallets connected 
• 4,200,000+ ships scanned  
• 500,000+ loot found 

Fun fact: On April 29, we reached ~5.6% of total Solana transactions.

 | Play now at https://sage.staratlas.com/

@everyone
